title: Add e2e coverage for ranking profiles
requirements: Create controlled fixtures where one document wins exact FTS, one wins semantic vector and one appears in both channels.
Verify precise ranks exact FTS match first.
Verify semantic_heavy ranks semantic vector match first.
Verify balanced boosts documents matched by both channels.
Verify source_content returns source_data with warning and FTS trace.
Verify source_semantic returns source_data with warning and LanceDB vector trace.
Verify a document with a detected secret is removed from FTS/vector indexes and creates blocker issue.
Verify a document with PII is indexed and creates audit issue.
Verify trace contains ranking_profile, weights, RRF details and final score.
